title: Service
description: Details on a service within a cluster. A service runs and maintains a specified number of instances of a task definition.

serviceArn.description: The ARN that identifies the service.

clusterArn.description: The ARN of the cluster that hosts the service.

desiredCount.description: The desired number of instantiations of the task definition to keep running on the service.

runningCount.description: The number of tasks in the cluster that are in the RUNNING state.

pendingCount.description: The number of tasks in the cluster that are in the PENDING state.

taskDefinition.description: The task definition ARN used by tasks in the service.

createdAt.description: The Unix timestamp for when the service was created.
